economic_ownership_map.label: Operating-company portfolio owner cash

low.label: FY2025 free cash flow excluding acquisitions

source.locator: FY2025 FCF ex-acquisitions 173.1 MSEK (operating CF less maintenance capex; ex M&A)

low.label: Shares outstanding (parent shareholders)
Seven-year owner-cash capitalization multiple on normalized FCF per share
low.rationale: Low stresses organic stagnation and multiple compression; base matches Lawrence 8%/5% growth with 16x year-10 exit; high allows margin hold plus bolt-on synergy.

low.label: Normalized owner cash per share

economic_ownership_map.evidence: FY2025: sales 1,800 MSEK, EBITA 203.1 MSEK, FCF ex-acquisitions 173.1 MSEK, cash 209.5 MSEK, net debt ex-leases 286.6 MSEK, contingent consideration 195.6 MSEK, 17,165,756 shares (TEQ.ST/official-reports/annual-reports/2026-03-21 - Årsredovisning 2025.pdf; TEQ.ST/official-reports/year-end-reports/2026-02-14 - Year-End Report 2025 - Teqnion AB.pdf). Proof: 126.3932/sh base via owner_cash_or_dividend_discount@1.0.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: The low/base/high range incorporates ownership, tax, capital, cycle, timing, and realization uncertainty pending the primary bridge.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows that the economic claim, cash conversion, ownership, or required capital is materially worse than this low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Acquisition reinvestment runway

method_provenance.label: Owner earnings and reinvestment-return DCF
method_provenance.equation: cash_t = cash_(t-1)*(1+reinvestment*incremental_ROIC); value = PV(distributable cash + terminal owner earnings)

sources.locator: Owner cash, reinvestment and reverse expectations

low.label: FY2025 cash spent on acquisitions (net of acquired cash)

source.locator: Företagsförvärv -306,9 MSEK in investing cash flow (Note 27)

low.label: Shares outstanding (parent shareholders)
Present-value multiple on incremental acquisition capital deployed
low.rationale: Low assumes indiscipline or goodwill impairment (73 MSEK Q3 2025); base reflects historical bolt-on returns; high assumes continued Nord/Väst pipeline at disciplined multiples.

economic_ownership_map.label: Cash, debt, and contingent-consideration claims

low.label: Cash and cash equivalents
Net debt excluding lease liabilities
Contingent consideration liability (earn-outs)
Unused credit facility headroom

source.locator: Outnyttjad del av kreditfacilitet ca 77,0 MSEK at 2025-12-31

low.label: Shares outstanding (parent shareholders)
Fraction of net debt charged against equity after operating DCF debt service
low.rationale: Operating owner-cash DCF embeds normalized leverage service; additive slice only counts excess liquidity net of senior claims.

low.label: Probability-weighted payout on contingent consideration
low.rationale: Earn-outs tied to subsidiary EBITA targets; low assumes full payout stress, high assumes most targets missed.

low.label: Fraction of unused credit facility counted as accessible liquidity
low.rationale: High case adds revolver headroom for bolt-on M&A within Net debt/EBITDA < 2.5 guardrail.

low.label: Debt charge applied to net financial claims

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
